domain: Kazakh/Kyrgyz Berkutchi golden eagle hunting (Central Asian steppe falconry; voice-imprinted master-eagle partnership; eagle obeys only master's voice; hood-launch-pursue-retrieve cycle; multi-stage relay identification→launch→flight→retrieve→recall; 40-year eagle lifespan with years of voice-imprint training)
specific_mechanism: BERKUTCHI-LAUNCH: master-specialist hood-launch-retrieve relay for long-horizon LLM execution. (1) Master agent M (large LLM) identifies remote sub-task T and packages launch context c (hood). (2) Specialist eagle agent A_eagle (smaller LLM fine-tuned via M's signature trajectories) launched with c — operates independently for K turns. (3) Retrieve: A_eagle returns output (kill). (4) Master validates + integrates output (recall); failure triggers re-launch with modified hood. (5) Voice-imprint distillation: A_eagle fine-tuned only on M's signature trajectories — obeys only M's tone/style. (6) Persistent specialist: A_eagle persists across launches with accumulated experience replay buffer.
llm_application: BERKUTCHI-LAUNCH for long-horizon LLM agent execution: master-specialist hood-launch-retrieve relay + voice-imprint distillation + persistent specialist replay. Differs from CHAP NDSS 2026 (agents work in shifts passing compressed state — closest, but no master-only voice-imprint distillation). EAGLET 2510.05608 (global planner training via consensus filtering — different — no master-specialist relay). Tree Search Agent RL 2509.21240 (search-based long-horizon — not master-specialist relay). Demystifying RL 2603.21972 (RL recipe — not specific relay). Differs from R422 CHASQUI-RELAY (runner handoff, no master-only distillation), R429 KAMI-SHIBAI (bordered-panel narrative), R438 PIROGUE-CASCADE (segment-payload), R455 HAUSA-ZANGO (persistent station accumulator) by EXPLICIT MASTER-VOICE-IMPRINT DISTILLATION + HOOD-LAUNCH K-TURN INDEPENDENT FLIGHT + PERSISTENT SPECIALIST REPLAY.
novelty_claim: CHAP + EAGLET + Tree Search Agent + Demystifying RL cover agent handoff + planner training. BERKUTCHI-LAUNCH adds (a) voice-imprint distillation (specialist obeys only master) + (b) hood-launch K-turn independent flight + (c) persistent specialist accumulated replay. Recombination — distillation + handoff individually mainstream.
